title: Diagrams
summary: Feature parent for authored document diagrams in Docs Viewer.
content_html:
Diagrams

Purpose

Add useful authored diagrams to Docs Viewer.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — authored-diagram purpose, candidate tools, build consequences, invariants, and questions to answer before delivery.
  • Docs Viewer Roadmap — relative importance and promotion into a finishable delivery.

Status

  • First implementation target: Mermaid source rendered locally to static SVG before Docs Viewer reads it.
  • The proposed convention is scope-relative: canonical .mmd source under the scope source root, and derived SVG through that scope's existing media and publication path.
  • No Mermaid installation, supported-version check, rendering command, source folder, first diagram, or automated build integration has been implemented yet.
  • D2 is a possible alternative if a concrete diagram exposes a Mermaid layout or expression limit.
